raw_response:
@certus(
    preconditions=["isinstance(list1, list)", "isinstance(L, int)", "0 <= L <= len(list1)"],
    postconditions=[
        {"when": "L == 0", "guarantees": ["result[0] == []", "result[1] == list1"]},
        {"when": "L == len(list1)", "guarantees": ["result[0] == list1", "result[1] == []"]},
        {"when": "always",
         "guarantees": ["isinstance(result, tuple)",
                        "len(result) == 2",
                        "len(result[0]) == L",
                        "len(result[1]) == len(list1) - L",
                        "result[0] == list1[:L]",
                        "result[1] == list1[L:]"]}
    ],
)
